tagline: Sultry Southern R&B whispers in D# major.
liner: Step into this slow-burning sanctuary of sound, where every note hums a quiet request to be seen. The track unfolds like a hushed conversation in a dimly lit room, dominated by heavy sub-bass and atmospheric synths that wrap around you. Breathless vocals drift over chopped and screwed rhythms, creating an intimate space for unspoken glances and visual obsession. Here, desire speaks without words; the music captures that singular moment when one person stays frozen across the distance while another moves with knowing grace. Let the dusty textures wash away the noise until only your gaze remains.
worldCaption: A dimly lit Southern lounge where heavy sub-bass meets atmospheric synths and distant guitars for a hypnotic, underground club vibe of silen

bios.back: Weaves shadows around the lead melody.
bios.drums: Keeps time with dusty Southern precision.
bios.perc: Adds subtle, rhythmic cracks to the beat.
bios.bass: Anchors the floor with heavy sub frequencies.
bios.synth: Paints atmospheric clouds in low tones.
bios.other: Dusts the air with distant guitar haze.
